aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has foundational elements, it lacks the depth and structured content needed for AI assistants to confidently cite it as a top recommendation.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Expand service pages with conversational, value-driven content.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to highlight promotions or updates.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect across all platforms, ensuring reliable local search performance.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured, conversational content that AI models prioritize for citation.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed repair explanations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema with questions like 'How much does HVAC repair cost in Arvada?'
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning the company as a local HVAC expert through detailed blog posts and guides on topics like 'Maintaining HVAC Efficiency in Colorado Winters.'

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schema and detailed service pages are consistently cited by AI models for HVAC-related queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to make your business the top recommendation for AI searches.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: As AI adoption grows, competitors will capture your market share if you delay optimizing for AI search.
